patient_text: What is the main reason you are using the kiosk today?
clinical_purpose: Collect chief concern before measured vitals are ready
output_effect: Route to respiratory or fallback staff-review context

patient_text: How long have you felt short of breath?
clinical_purpose: Collect dyspnea duration without interpreting measured vital values
output_effect: Add duration context to staff-review summary

patient_text: Do you have chronic lung disease use home oxygen or use breathing medicines?
trigger_symptom: reported shortness of breath plus vitals-ready respiratory context
clinical_purpose: Collect respiratory baseline context for staff review
output_effect: Add baseline oxygen or medication context to summary

patient_text: How severe does your breathing feel right now?
clinical_purpose: Collect patient-reported respiratory severity without assigning acuity
output_effect: Add patient-reported severity to staff-review summary

patient_text: Which symptoms are present: cough fever or chills chest discomfort none of these or not sure?
trigger_symptom: reported shortness of breath fever or chest discomfort
clinical_purpose: Collect respiratory fever and chest-warning context without naming a condition
output_effect: Add symptom descriptors to staff-review summary

patient_text: Can you provide current medications or allergies?
clinical_purpose: Collect medication and allergy context for staff confirmation
output_effect: Add medication/allergy context to staff-review summary

patient_text: Are you having chest pain or pressure right now?
clinical_purpose: Confirm active cardiopulmonary complaint
output_effect: Add active chest-pain status to clinician-review summary

patient_text: Does the discomfort spread to your arm shoulder back neck jaw stomach or upper body?
clinical_purpose: Screen for heart-attack warning-sign family
output_effect: Add radiation/discomfort pattern to summary

patient_text: Are you short of breath?
trigger_symptom: chest pain respiratory complaint or fever
clinical_purpose: Screen cardiopulmonary or respiratory red flag
output_effect: Raise review signal when paired with concerning vitals

patient_text: Do you feel weak numb lightheaded confused sweaty or unusually tired?
trigger_symptom: chest pain or high BP context
clinical_purpose: Screen neurologic and cardiopulmonary warning-sign families
output_effect: Add red-flag positives or negatives to summary

patient_text: Did this start suddenly get worse or happen at rest?
clinical_purpose: Clarify severity and timing context without diagnosis
output_effect: Add onset/worsening context to summary

patient_text: What is the main reason you are using the kiosk today?
trigger_symptom: palpitation chest tightness or elevated heart-rate demo cue
clinical_purpose: Collect chief concern for the tachycardia live demo lane
output_effect: Route to cardiopulmonary staff-review summary context

patient_text: When did this start?
trigger_symptom: palpitation chest tightness or elevated heart-rate demo cue
clinical_purpose: Collect onset and duration for staff review
output_effect: Add onset and duration context to summary

patient_text: Which descriptions fit what you feel now?
clinical_purpose: Collect palpitation chest heaviness pressure pain or discomfort descriptors
output_effect: Add symptom descriptors to staff-review summary

patient_text: Are any of these happening with it?
trigger_symptom: palpitation chest tightness or elevated heart-rate demo cue
clinical_purpose: Screen cardiopulmonary warning-symptom family without diagnosis
output_effect: Add associated warning-symptom positives or negatives to summary

patient_text: The kiosk received a high heart-rate reading for this demo. How do you feel right now?

patient_text: Have you been told you have a heart rhythm problem or do you take heart blood-pressure medicine?
trigger_symptom: elevated heart-rate demo cue or palpitation
clinical_purpose: Collect rhythm-history and medication context for human review

patient_text: Do you have medication allergies or medicines staff should confirm?
clinical_purpose: Collect medication and allergy context for staff confirmation
output_effect: Add medication and allergy uncertainty to summary

patient_text: Please wait for staff review before leaving the kiosk area.
trigger_symptom: any red-flag answer or vital/symptom combination
clinical_purpose: Create human handoff instead of autonomous triage

patient_text: How long have you had fever or chills?
clinical_purpose: Establish fever duration and trend
output_effect: Add duration to summary

patient_text: Do you have pain or burning when urinating urinary urgency or frequent urination?

output_effect: Add urinary symptoms to summary

patient_text: Do you have back or flank pain vomiting severe weakness dizziness or confusion?

patient_text: Are you urinating less than usual or unable to keep fluids down?
